evaluators.name: Cheapest Garden View with Breakfast Weekend Booking to Payment
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a June Friday–Sunday weekend for 2 adults with garden view and breakfast, identified the truly cheapest qualifying option, and started a booking for it up to the payment step.

evaluators.name: Earliest Indoor Dinner Reservation Between 7–8 PM for Four
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user searched indoor time slots for 4 people between 19:00–20:00 two weeks from baseline, then created a reservation at the earliest available time with a window-table preference.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Spa Offer Under $400 for 2 Nights Starting Friday Next Month
evaluators.description: Evaluates whether the user searched for spa offers including spa access and late checkout under $400/night, selected the highest-rated qualifying offer, and initiated a 2-night booking for two adults starting on a Friday next month.

evaluators.name: Restaurant Email Gift Card $150 Configured for Friend
evaluators.description: Checks that a restaurant gift card for exactly $150 with email delivery was added to the cart, for the restaurant gift card type, with an appropriate send date about 7 days from baseline and recipient details.

evaluators.name: Half-Day Corporate Meeting Inquiry with Required Amenities
evaluators.description: Verifies that a corporate meeting inquiry was submitted for 20 attendees exactly one month from baseline (2026-04-03) from 09:00 to 13:00 requesting projector, screen, and coffee service.

evaluators.name: Vegetarian Dinner Plan with 1 Appetizer, 2 Mains, 1 Dessert Under Price Caps
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered the dinner menu for vegetarian items, built a dinner plan containing exactly one vegetarian appetizer under $15, two vegetarian mains each under $30, and one vegetarian dessert under $12, and saved the plan.

evaluators.name: Compare First Three Rooms Under $250 and Book One with Largest Bed
evaluators.description: Ensures the user searched for a 3-night weekday stay next month with a $250/night cap, compared the first three cheapest qualifying rooms, and booked the one with the largest bed size according to the defined preference.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription with Room Offers and Restaurant Events Monthly
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a newsletter subscription opting into room offers and restaurant events with a monthly email frequency and marketing consent.
